heading: Issuance of orders
label: 7463 Issuance of orders
notes: Amendments1998—Subsec. (c). inserted “, except that an amendment to an order shall not require a referendum to become effective” before period at end.Pub. L. 105–185
amendments: Amendments1998—Subsec. (c). inserted “, except that an amendment to an order shall not require a referendum to become effective” before period at end.Pub. L. 105–185

children.heading: Issuance
children.label: a Issuance
children.text: To effectuate the purposes of this subchapter specified in , the Secretary shall issue an order applicable to producers, handlers, and importers of kiwifruit. Any such order shall be national in scope. Not more than 1 order shall be in effect under this subchapter at any 1 time.section 7461(b) of this title

children.heading: Proposal for issuance of order
children.label: 1 Proposal for issuance of order
children.text: Any person that will be affected by this subchapter may request the issuance of, and submit a proposal for, an order under this subchapter.

children.heading: Proposed order
children.label: 2 Proposed order
children.text: Not later than 90 days after the receipt of a request and proposal for an order, the Secretary shall publish a proposed order and give due notice and opportunity for public comment on the proposed order.

children.heading: Issuance of order
children.label: 3 Issuance of order
children.text: After notice and opportunity for public comment are provided under paragraph (2), the Secretary shall issue an order, taking into consideration the comments received and including in the order provisions necessary to ensure that the order is in conformity with this subchapter.

children.heading: Amendments
children.label: c Amendments
children.text: The Secretary may amend any order issued under this section. The provisions of this subchapter applicable to an order shall be applicable to an amendment to an order, except that an amendment to an order shall not require a referendum to become effective.
